title: Fix missing navigation menu items after Version 20 deployment

requirements.text: Restore all navigation menu items in the Header component that were visible before Version 20. Ensure authenticated users see 'My Events', 'Find Organizers', 'My Bookings', and 'Organizer Dashboard' links in addition to the logout button.

quotes: Only logout option is there now... Look into it

acceptanceCriteria: All navigation links ('My Events', 'Find Organizers', 'My Bookings', 'Organizer Dashboard') are visible in the desktop menu for authenticated users
Mobile menu hamburger displays all navigation options when opened
Logout button remains functional alongside other menu items
Navigation menu appearance matches the state before Version 20 deployment

requirements.text: Verify that the navigation menu conditional rendering logic correctly handles authenticated vs unauthenticated states without hiding menu items inappropriately.
acceptanceCriteria: Unauthenticated users see appropriate landing page navigation
Authenticated users see full navigation menu with all role-appropriate links
No CSS or styling rules are hiding navigation items unintentionally

constraints: Do not modify authentication logic or Internet Identity integration
Preserve existing routing structure and page components
nonGoals: Redesigning the header layout or styling
Adding new navigation items beyond what existed before Version 20
Changing the logout button appearance or position
